# con-sign

> An e-ink "door sign" for hotel rooms at furry conventions. Roommates show
> their fursonas, names, handles, and rough whereabouts. Random passersby
> see a sanitized view; anyone who scans the QR and enters a per-roommate
> passcode sees more detail; admins manage everything from the web UI.

The site is in early development. Only the marketing splash is shipped to
the public domain today; sign-in, dashboard, and visitor flows live in code
but aren't wired into the splash yet.

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/sparkyfen/con-sign)
- [Design plan / canonical doc](https://github.com/sparkyfen/con-sign/blob/main/PLAN.md)
- [API reference](https://github.com/sparkyfen/con-sign/blob/main/docs/api.md)
- [Security disclosures](https://cons.social/.well-known/security.txt)

## Stack

- Frontend: SvelteKit on Cloudflare Pages
- Backend: Cloudflare Worker (Hono) at `cons.social/api/*`
- Database: Cloudflare D1
- Sessions: Cloudflare KV
- Auth: Bluesky OAuth (AT Protocol) + Telegram Login Widget
